title: The Midnight Library
author: Matt Haig
description: A story about the choices that go into a life well lived, set in a library between life and death.

title: Clean Code
author: Robert C. Martin
description: A handbook of agile software craftsmanship, essential for any tech enthusiast.

title: Astrophysics for People in a Hurry
author: Neil deGrasse Tyson
description: A quick and clear guide to the nature of space and time and the universe's secrets.

title: The Alchemist
author: Paulo Coelho
description: A mystical story of Santiago, an Andalusian shepherd boy who yearns to travel in search of a worldly treasure.

title: React Design Patterns
author: Michele Bertoli
description: Learn how to build scalable and maintainable applications with modern React practices.

title: Brief Answers to the Big Questions
author: Stephen Hawking
description: The final book from one of the greatest minds in history, discussing the universe's biggest mysteries.

title: The Kite Runner
author: Khaled Hosseini
description: An emotional story of friendship, betrayal, and redemption in war-torn Afghanistan.

title: Pragmatic Programmer
author: Andrew Hunt
description: A classic guide to turning from a coder into a professional software developer.

title: The Selfish Gene
author: Richard Dawkins
description: A landmark work in evolutionary biology that reshaped how we think about natural selection.

title: The Great Gatsby
author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
description: A story of ambition, love, and the American dream in the 1920s.

title: Understanding Deep Learning
author: Simon Prince
description: A comprehensive tech guide to neural networks and the future of artificial intelligence.

title: Cosmos
author: Carl Sagan
description: A journey through the evolution of the universe and the human curiosity that explores it.
